name: go-logql
description: Go package to programmatically build Loki LogQL queries — type-safe query builder for observability pipelines.

name: dj-electric
description: Django package to integrate the ElectricSQL sync engine — lets Django apps go local-first over Postgres.

name: observal
description: Observability platform & marketplace for MCP servers. Contributor + community manager — shipped pip/brew install, diagnostics, playground, GitBooks docs, and import/export for vendor portability.

name: Robotics Academy
description: Open-source robotics learning platform using ROS, Gazebo, and Rviz. GSoC contribution: migrated 26 exercises from vanilla JS to React, lifting learner retention by 50%.

name: Template Creation Portal
description: Code for GovTech project — configurable portal for government micro-improvement templates with versioning and role-based access.

name: AI-Image-Caption-Bot
description: Deep-learning model that generates descriptive captions for images — applications in search, assistive tech, and autonomous driving.
